holdings.infoBox: ICPY is an equity ETF with a total of 394 individual holdings.

overview.description: The Tweedy, Browne International Insider + Value ETF (ICPY) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is actively managed, investing in undervalued stocks of global companies with known insider purchases or opportunistic share buybacks. Securities are selected using a quantitative, decision-rule-based process. ICPY was launched on Sep 10, 2025 and is issued by Tweedy, Browne Co.
